caption: The video features a woman speaking at a podium during an event at the United States Institute of Peace, as indicated by the backdrop. She is wearing a black dress with ruffled sleeves, a statement necklace, and red-framed glasses. Her gestures are expressive; she uses her hands to emphasize points as she speaks. In the first frame, she appears to be making a point with her right hand open, palm facing up. In the second frame, her right hand is raised higher, fingers spread apart, suggesting a more animated part of her speech. The setting suggests a formal or academic presentation, possibly involving discussions on peace, conflict resolution, or related topics. A flag is partially visible on the left side of the frame, adding to the official atmosphere of the event.
